MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF TR&A, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

TR&A, Inc.'s unopposed "motion to compel arbitration" is granted.

Order signed.
